result:
Implemented the `inbox` capture workflow.

`go run . inbox ...` now appends a timestamped entry to a dedicated [`main.go`](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go) inbox note at `notes/inbox.md`. The new command is wired into the CLI dispatcher and help output, creates the inbox note on first use with an `inbox` tag, appends plain captures as list items, and supports `--task` to store open checkbox tasks for later triage. Existing inbox updates are versioned with note history just like other mutations.

I also added coverage in [`main_test.go`](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go) for first-time inbox creation, appending task captures, and dispatch through `run([]string{"inbox", ...})`, and documented usage in [`README.md`](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md).

I could not run `gofmt` or `go test` here because this environment does not have `go` or `gofmt` available on `PATH`.
